ddls:
CREATE TABLE "providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "provider_type" TEXT /* Type of provider (e.g., individual, medical group, hospital) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the provider */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the provider */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the provider */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the provider */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for contact purposes */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact purposes */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Unique license number for the provider */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the program */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the program starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the program ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the program (e.g., active, retired) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the program was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eligibility_criteria" (
  "criteria_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each criteria */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the criteria belongs to */,
  "criteria_name" TEXT /* Name of the criteria */,
  "criteria_description" TEXT /* Description of the criteria */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight or importance of the criteria in the eligibility decision */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criteria was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the criteria was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("criteria_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the provider */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the relationship expires */,
  "eligibility_status" TEXT /* Eligibility status of the provider for the program */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES measurement_programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measure */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship the measure belongs to */,
  "measure_name" TEXT /* Name of the measure */,
  "measure_value" REAL /* Value of the measure */,
  "measure_date" TEXT /* Date the measure was taken */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of the measure (e.g., quality, performance) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measure was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measures_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics data point */,
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relationship the analytics data belongs to */,
  "analytics_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytics data point */,
  "analytics_value" REAL /* Value of the analytics data point */,
  "analytics_date" TEXT /* Date the analytics data point was taken */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analytics (e.g., trend analysis, comparative analysis) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the analytics data point (e.g., percentage, count) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data point was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analytics data point was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_relationship_id FOREIGN KEY ("relationship_id") REFERENCES relationships ("relationship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, provider, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view provider data) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "providermeasureelig" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each provider measure eligibility */,
  "begineffectivedt" TEXT /* Date and time for which this table row becomes effective */,
  "endeffectivedt" TEXT /* Date and time after which the row is no longer valid as active current data */,
  "breligibleproviderid" INTEGER /* The provider that is being measured */,
  "br_elig_prov_meas_relt_id" INTEGER /* Unique, generated number that identifies a single row on the BR_ELIG_PROV_MEAS_RELTN table */,
  "activeind" TEXT /* The table row is active or inactive */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider measure eligibility was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider measure eligibility was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for the action (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
